name: FRANKLIN STREET PROPERTIES CORP /MA/
summary: Franklin Street Properties Corp. (FSP) is a Maryland-based REIT focused on commercial real estate investments, primarily office properties in U.S. sunbelt and mountain west regions. FSP generates revenue through rental income, property dispositions, and asset/property management fees. The company owns and operates a portfolio of 14 office properties and provides management services through subsidiaries FSP Investments LLC and FSP Property Management LLC.

products.name: Office Property Leasing
products.description: Rental of commercial office space in infill and central business district locations across U.S. sunbelt and mountain west markets.

products.name: Asset/Property Management
products.description: Asset management, property management, property accounting, and investor/development services provided through FSP Investments LLC and FSP Property Management LLC.
